description: Publish approved content for EN account. 1) Update data/content_plan_20260309_EN.json to set EN_20260309_01 status to 'approved'. 2) Run publisher.py to post it: python3 scripts/publisher.py post --account EN --slot 1. 3) Check if there's an image in media/pending/EN_20260309_01.* — if not, post text-only. 4) Report results back.
